summary: Booking Request feature testing complete. All features working correctly: POST /api/booking-request endpoint validates and stores bookings, Restaurant and Beach Club cards show quick view with 'Reserve Table'/'Book Now' buttons that open BookingRequestModal, form submission shows success state with 72-hour confirmation message. Hotels and Golf Courses correctly show external links instead of booking modal.

booking_request_api.details: Valid submissions return success with booking ID, all required fields validated (guest_name, guest_email, guest_phone, date, time, guests, venue_name, venue_type), invalid email rejected, optional fields work correctly

restaurant_booking_flow.details: 48 restaurant cards found, quick view opens with 'Reserve Table' button, clicking opens BookingRequestModal with all form fields

beach_club_booking_flow.feature: Beach Club Quick View → Booking Modal
beach_club_booking_flow.details: 12 beach club cards found, quick view opens with 'Book Now' button, clicking opens BookingRequestModal

booking_submission.details: Form submission shows success modal with 'Request Sent!' message, venue name, and 72-hour confirmation window

hotel_golf_no_booking.details: QuickViewModal correctly shows external CTA link (not booking button) for hotel and golf types - verified via code review of QuickViewModal.jsx lines 106-125

passed_tests: POST /api/booking-request with valid data returns success with booking ID
POST /api/booking-request for beach_club venue type works
Booking data stored in MongoDB booking_requests collection
Restaurant section renders 48 cards with quick view eye icons
Restaurant quick view opens QuickViewModal with 'Reserve Table' button
BookingRequestModal shows all required form fields
Beach clubs section renders 12 cards with quick view buttons
Beach club quick view opens with 'Book Now' button
Beach club booking modal opens correctly
Form submission shows success state with confirmation message
Hotels/Golf courses show external links (not booking modal) - verified via code
critical_code_review_comments: BookingRequestModal.jsx correctly implements all form fields with proper data-testid attributes
QuickViewModal.jsx correctly conditionally renders booking button only for restaurant/beach_club types (lines 106-125)
RestaurantPartners.jsx and BeachClubPartners.jsx correctly pass onBooking callback to QuickViewModal
HotelPartners.jsx and GolfCourses.jsx correctly do NOT pass onBooking callback - they use external links
Backend POST /api/booking-request endpoint properly validates required fields via Pydantic model
Booking data stored in MongoDB with id, status='pending', and created_at timestamp
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix in guest_name for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking Request feature fully tested and working. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_booking_request.py with 15 tests covering API validation and persistence. Frontend booking flow works for restaurants (48 cards) and beach clubs (12 cards). Hotels and golf courses correctly show external links instead of booking modal. Email sending via Resend may not deliver in preview environment but API returns success regardless.

notes.email_integration: Emails via Resend may not deliver in preview environment (domain is golfinmallorca.com) but API returns success regardless - this is expected behavior as noted in the review request
notes.date_validation: Frontend date picker correctly enforces minimum date (today) - tested with future date 2026-04-15
